cn.description:
灾后的荒漠小城沙石镇迫切需要全面的重建。
我们诚挚而迫切地邀请您成为新的工坊主，您可以在这里用不同的方式收集资源，在专属工坊中创造各种机器和设备，也可以探索广阔的沙漠，深入废墟，搜寻旧世界遗留的古老文物，甚至与怪物斗智斗勇。经营崭新生活也少不了种植，烹饪，养殖，与沙石镇居民建立不同的关系等等丰富多样的玩法！
工坊主，在这里曾有无数治沙人的努力被风沙掩埋，重现绿洲的梦想似乎遥不可及，如今，使命传递至你的手中，期待你续写让沙石镇重焕生机的史诗篇章。

感谢你体验《沙石镇时光》手游，也由衷感谢你对「良心工作室」的支持。愿你在这片黄沙之地，亲手缔造属于自己的温暖与美好。

【建设专属工坊】
从无到有，一切尽在您手，您可以将各种复杂精密的机器排列组合在一起，打造专属于您的工坊，并制作各式各样的工具或设备；您可以通过劳作，将戈壁变成可耕种的肥沃土地，拥有着特色沙漠种植系统的沙石镇时光是您不能错过的种田游戏；您可以扩建栅栏，养上一大堆沙漠地区特有的动物，成为这个小镇首屈一指的牧场主；全新加入的房屋扩建系统，可以让每个玩家都建造出自己独有的房屋，家园升级不再千篇一律。

【探索开放世界】
广阔天地，任您畅游，您可以探索小镇周围的广阔沙漠，深入各种废墟探险；从充满生活气息的城镇到散发神秘色彩的戈壁，各种新奇的怪物，各种沙漠特色坐骑等您来体验。

【享受甜蜜时光】
在沙石镇，你就是最耀眼的明星！沉浸于超过100小时的主线剧情，探索数百个支线故事，与40多位性格各异的角色相遇、相识、相知。他们每个人都有独一无二的故事等你揭开，或许，还会与某个人擦出意想不到的爱情火花……

【战斗，就是要炫！】
通过自由搭配技能树，解锁酷炫招式，驾驭各式强力武器，迎战千奇百怪的怪物军团。这里的每一场战斗，都让你酣畅淋漓！

【不止好玩，更要好听好看】
更多的？可以有！你可以听到更加生动和动感的音乐，并且体验新的声效技术，让您仅凭声音就能知道身处何方！独特的天气系统，带你感受“黄沙万里滔天”的壮丽奇观。更有丰富趣味小游戏等你来玩，让你在工坊经营之余体验到多彩的沙石镇风土人情。

【移动端专属装扮】
手游专属礼服？免费送！我们为工坊主们提供了移动端专属的各种装扮，从国风礼服到清爽T恤，只为让你在沙石镇活出不一样的人生！

【手游适配与优化】
厌倦了在PC端的繁琐操作？试试更懂你的移动端！
贴合掌心的操作优化，专为手游触屏设计。
PC端组装太麻烦？移动端极简操作不再烦恼！
另外，还有更醒目的视觉指引与交互引导，助你畅游沙石镇！

【设备要求与说明】
为保证游戏流畅体验，我们推荐使用运行内存（RAM）为6GB及以上的iOS设备进行游玩。
《沙石镇时光》是一款包含许多3D模型渲染的游戏，即便是PC端也需要GTX1060及以上的显卡才能畅玩，为了能在手机上精细呈现沙石镇的生动细节，我们做了很多的移动端兼容适配，但无法避免的是对设备还是有一定的性能要求，尤其是在iOS端的运行内存（RAM）方面。
同时，为了确保游戏可以兼容更多的IOS低端设备，我们也不得已对运行内存（RAM）为4GB的设备做了一些调整，在游戏中会缺少人物对话语音，以及在游戏存档后期（如小镇建筑、NPC数量增加时），运行内存为4GB的设备可能会出现卡顿情况，极端情况下可能出现闪退。
（运行内存为6GB及以上设备完全不会受到上述内容影响）
使用RAM为4GB设备的工坊主，若比较在意游戏目前的优化状况，还请谨慎购买。但毫无疑问，我们将尽快进行版本更迭，努力为更多设备带来更优秀的游戏体验。

注：游戏安装后约占13GB储存空间，需预留16GB或更多储存空间，以确保游戏可以顺利安装与加载资源。

cn.description:
《迷雾北境》（Bad North）是一款迷人又残酷的实时策略游戏。带领你绝望的子民，捍卫你宁静祥和的岛国，对抗维京部落的入侵者。指挥你忠诚的臣民充分利用每个岛屿的地理优势作为战术优势。一切都危在旦夕：失败，并看着你子民的鲜血染红了土地。
继续战斗，勇士们。不是为了权力、财富或荣耀，只希望和平再次降临这片绝境。

【游戏特色】
1.实时战术肉鸽玩法：调兵遣将抵御维京入侵，敌人会随机应变威胁你的布局。谨慎选择战场，周密规划转移路线！指挥官阵亡无法复活，一旦失败将永久失去所有进度！

2.即时战略动态博弈：你坐镇后方运筹帷幄，士兵们则在前线自主应对战局。下达战略指令，观察部队在战场上即时做出临场反应。

3.随机生成奇幻岛屿：每座岛屿皆风景如画且地形迥异。你只有一次拯救家园的机会，必须根据独特地貌制定万全之策。

4.军队养成进阶体系：愈精锐的防守带来越丰厚的战利品。将你的子民从散兵游勇逐步培养成百战雄师，用资源把民兵锻造成传奇勇士。

Genius Scan是一款可装入口袋的扫描仪。 可随时随地快速扫描文档，并能导出为JPEG或多页PDF文件。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多万用户 *** 1000多家小企业 ***

将任何文档放在设备的相机前面：我们的扫描仪应用程序会自动识别背景纸张，裁剪纸张并清理结果。您可以获得清晰易读的扫描。批量扫描可让您在几秒钟内扫描数十页。强大的工具可帮助您组织、共享或归档文档。

“这是一款绝对精彩的应用。” -  AppSafari.com

“下一次出差时别忘了下载一个 Genius Scan，可以给自己和会计部门带来很大方便。” -  AppPicker.com

==企业版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 开箱即用（无需升级）Genius Scan+ 的所有高级功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理配置： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的设备中
 - 按用户预先配置部署应用程序设置（例如，设置默认电子邮件地址，WebDAV / FTP 凭据） 
 - 控制用户可以将文档导出到哪些应用程序和服务
 - 无广告

==主要功能== 

智能扫描： 

 - 文件检测和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 阴影去除和缺陷清理
 - 滤镜（黑白、白板、照片） 
 - 批量扫描

 PDF创建和编辑： 

 - 文档合并和拆分
 - 多页PDF创建
 - 照片和PDF导入

安全和隐私： 

 - 设备上文档处理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密码加密

文件组织： 

 - 文档标记
 - 元数据和内容搜索
 + 自定义命名方案（智能文档名称） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud进行备份和多设备同步（单独订阅） 

导出：

 - 电子邮件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何与WebDAV兼容的服务，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud、ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。

OCR（文本识别）：

 + 文字提取
 + 创建可搜索的PDF
 + 扫描名片和创建联系人

==关于我们== 

The Grizzly Labs在法国巴黎市中心开发了Genius Scan。我们制作能够帮助全世界数百万用户的应用程序并在质量和隐私方面保持最高标准，我们为此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑问，请通过@thegrizzlylabs联系我们。

==定价和法律==

您可以订阅Genius Cloud进行备份和同步。在这种情况下，Genius Scan的商店会显示每个订阅的持续时间和价格，并在购买时更新。订单确认后，将从iTunes帐户中收取付款。除非在当前期间结束前24小时内关闭自动续订，否则订阅会自动续订。管理订阅，禁用iTunes帐户设置中的自动续订。

cn.description:
LumaFusion: 视频编辑的终极叙事体验

欢迎使用App Store 2021年“年度应用程序”和“编辑选择奖”获得者！为全世界的故事讲述者设立黄金标准，提供流畅、直观、专为触摸屏设计的编辑体验。

专业视频编辑轻松完成
• 6个视频/音频或图形轨道：创建多个图层的合成，流畅处理4K ProRes和HDR媒体。
• 6个额外的音频轨道：构建您的音效。
• 终极时间轴：使用世界上最灵活的轨道式和磁性时间线进行流畅编辑。
• 多种过渡效果：保持您的故事推进。
• 外部显示器预览：在大屏幕上查看您的作品。
• 标记、标签和备注：保持有序。
• 配音：在播放电影的同时进行录制。

分层效果和色彩校正
• 绿屏、Luma和色度键：用于创意合成。
• 锁定与加载视频稳定器：保持镜头稳定
• 强大的色彩校正：打造您自己的外观。
• 视频波形、矢量和柱状图显示器。
• LUTs：导入并应用多个 .cube 或 .3dl LUT。
• 无限关键帧：精确制作动画效果。
• 可定制的文本和效果预设：保存并分享您最喜欢的动画和样式。
• 网格和导线：使用标题安全网格、动作安全网格和水平线，精确对齐元素。

高级音频控制
• 图形均衡器、参数均衡器和声音隔离：微调音频。
• 关键帧音频水平、平移和均衡器：制作无缝混音。
• 支持立体声和双单声道音频：非常适合在一个剪辑中使用多个麦克风进行采访。
• 音频降噪：平衡音乐和对话。
• 第三方音频插件：增强声音。

创意标题和多层文本
• 多层标题：将形状、图像和文本组合到图形中。
• 可自定义的字体、颜色、边框和阴影：设计引人注目的标题
• 导入自定义字体：增强您的品牌。
• 保存或分享标题预设：完美适用于协作。

项目灵活性和媒体库
• 适用于所有用途的宽高比：从宽银幕电影到社交媒体。
• 帧率从18fps到240fps：灵活适用于任何工作流程。
• 从照片、Frame.io或直接从USB-C驱动器进行编辑：在任何地方访问您的内容。
• 从云存储导入媒体：无论存储在哪里。

分享您的杰作
• 控制分辨率、质量和格式：
• 将电影分享到社交媒体、本地存储或云端存储。
• 在多台设备上编辑：无缝传输项目。

增强功能（单独购买，或作为创作者通行证订阅的一部分全部获取 - 见下文）
• 速度调节和增强关键帧 - 使用这一独特且易于使用的功能创建速度渐变、贝塞尔曲线和缓动效果。
XML导出：将您的项目发送到Mac版Final Cut Pro
• 多机位工作室：同步6台摄像机或音频，并点击切换角度

创作者通行证订阅
• 获取LumaFusion的Storyblocks的全面访问权限：数百万高质量的免版税音乐、SFX和视频，并获取上述所有增强功能。

卓越的免费支持服务

hk.description:
Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

==企業版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理組態： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中
 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） 
 - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務
 - 無廣告

==主要功能== 

智慧掃描： 

 - 檔案檢測和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理
 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） 
 - 批量掃描

 PDF建立和編輯： 

 - 文件合併和拆分
 - 多頁PDF創建
 - 照片和PDF匯入

安全和隱私： 

 - 裝置上文件處理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密碼加密

文件組織： 

 - 文件標記
 - 元數據和內容搜索
 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 

匯出：

 - 電子郵件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自動後台自動匯出

OCR（文本識別）：

 + 文字提取
 + 創建可搜尋的PDF
 + 掃描名片和建立連絡人

==關於我們== 

The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。

==定價和法律==

您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。

hk.description:
"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration."
-Nikola Tesla

KEY FEATURES:

- Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app
- Customizable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center
- Real-time aurora prediction with full map view
- Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro)
- Advanced burst analysis and notifications (EarthBeat Pro)
- Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro)
- Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro)
- Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages)

Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity.

EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) data. The GCP displays as a 3D colored indicator reflecting global consciousness patterns.

Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP Dot Widget displays consciousness patterns.

New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom.

EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, and 10-week archive for tracking patterns. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development.
Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields.

Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian.

If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch.
All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app.

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！

找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。

多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。
美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

Follow Dr. Zander as he is pushed to his wits-end in this final adventure.

Features:
• The final and longest chapter in the Meridian 157 storyline!
• The most unique and challenging puzzles to date
• Immersive graphics
• Custom ambient soundtrack
• A logical two tier hint system
• Available in 9 different languages
• Color blind mode

hk.description:
法医气象学家David Zander（大卫·赞德）的故事即将完结。大卫被困在一个失落而被遗忘的岛屿的地下深处，他的首要任务是从他周围的神秘事物寻找答案，并且从他所处的危机中生存下来。现在由你来寻找逃离危机重重的157子午线背后的方法，但是要注意，因为逃离可不会那么容易。大卫会找到他想要的答案吗，他的努力是徒劳的吗？

《子午线157》是一个触控式冒险系列，一系列章节种包含各种互动谜题和有趣的故事情节。本游戏使用最先进的渲染技术构建，重点在于让玩家沉浸在独特又恐怖的环境中，同时让玩家享受新奇的解谜过程。现在来尝试完全免费的章节吧，来体验《子午线157》系列提供全新感受！

特征：
•定制音乐，以及高品质的视觉体验：
•全新的产品组合功能，支持多种不同的播放风格
•最新一集更新了一段惊险刺激的故事情节
•富有挑战性和趣味性的谜题
•非常困难的谜语解谜系统
•提供8种语言，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、中文（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！
•新的色盲模式适用于可能有色盲问题的人

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的恐怖或驚嚇題材
偶爾/輕度使用或提及酒精、煙草或藥物
hk.description:
在寻找神秘现象时，你发现自己被困在一个偏远寒冷，靠近北极岛屿上的一处设施中。这是什么地方？是谁建造了它？为什么遭到遗弃了？探索无人居住的复杂环境，你现在发现自己陷入困境，但要注意：可能并不只有你自己在这里…

灵感来源于经典的点击式解谜游戏，《子午线157:第一章》是这个的冒险系列的最新力作。你将扮演大卫·赞德（David Zander），作为一位气象学家，亲自去阿拉斯加海岸调查一个神秘的天气异常。在这里，你将搜索，调查并解开重重谜团，进一步深揭开第157条子午线背后的真相。

游戏特色：
• 代入式、令人印象深刻的定制配乐和音效
• 延续了惊险刺激情节
• 设计精巧的解谜内容
• 为困难谜题设计的逻辑提示系统
• 8种语言版本，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、汉语（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。


隱私權政策：

https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

使用條款（最終使用者許可協議）：

Apple App Store：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

hk.trackName: 無盡坦克大戰 - 八位元單機王者 完美模擬穿越舊經典電視手遊
hk.description:
經典到不能再經典的紅白機坦克, 小時候發夢也在玩. 在2012年我們為了延續兒時回憶, 開發了超級坦克大戰, 很多人到現在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因為我們提供了500張地圖. 天天玩, 玩了多年也還未玩完.

由於遊戲引擎老化問題, 我們很難在超級坦克大戰的基礎上加入新功能. 所以我們決定開發新的坦克大戰, "無盡坦克大戰", 延續經典回憶. 

作為經典的延續無盡坦克大戰, 包含了所有經典元素, 改良了的新特點.
保證你可以玩到下一個十年.

遊戲重點:
- 防禦你的基地
- 摧毀所有敵方坦克
- 加入超級坦克大戰500張傳奇地圖

無盡坦克大戰, 是個跨平台遊戲, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的蹤影.
遊戲會不定期更新, 目標是1000張地圖.

灵感来源于经典的点击式解谜游戏，《子午线157:第一章》是这个的冒险系列的最新力作。你将扮演大卫·赞德（David Zander），作为一位气象学家，亲自去阿拉斯加海岸调查一个神秘的天气异常。在这里，你将搜索，调查并解开重重谜团，进一步深揭开第157条子午线背后的真相。

游戏特色：
• 代入式、令人印象深刻的定制配乐和音效
• 延续了惊险刺激情节
• 设计精巧的解谜内容
• 为困难谜题设计的逻辑提示系统
• 8种语言版本，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、汉语（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

適合：
- 預約（醫生、大使館等）
- 客戶服務或技術支援
- 致電公共辦公室
- 自由工作者和企業主跟進客戶

無論您是打電話預約醫生、聯繫客戶服務，還是在線路繁忙時嘗試連接，此應用程式都可以節省時間和避免煩惱。


隱私權政策：

https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1

使用條款（最終使用者許可協議）：

Apple App Store：https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

mo.description:
經典到不能再經典的紅白機坦克, 小時候發夢也在玩. 在2012年我們為了延續兒時回憶, 開發了超級坦克大戰, 很多人到現在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因為我們提供了500張地圖. 天天玩, 玩了多年也還未玩完.

由於遊戲引擎老化問題, 我們很難在超級坦克大戰的基礎上加入新功能. 所以我們決定開發新的坦克大戰, "無盡坦克大戰", 延續經典回憶. 

作為經典的延續無盡坦克大戰, 包含了所有經典元素, 改良了的新特點.
保證你可以玩到下一個十年.

遊戲重點:
- 防禦你的基地
- 摧毀所有敵方坦克
- 加入超級坦克大戰500張傳奇地圖

無盡坦克大戰, 是個跨平台遊戲, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的蹤影.
遊戲會不定期更新, 目標是1000張地圖.

mo.description:
LumaFusion: 影片編輯的終極敘事體驗

歡迎體驗 App Store 2021「年度最佳 App」及「編輯精選獎」的得獎 App！我們是世界各地故事創作者的專業標準，提供流暢直觀、為觸控螢幕而設計的剪輯體驗。

【專業剪輯從此簡單又輕鬆】
• 6 條影音軌 / 圖像軌道：建立多層編輯，並平滑處理 4K ProRes 和 HDR 媒體。
• 另外 6 條音軌：建立聲景。
• 終極時間軸體驗：使用全球最靈活的軌道及磁性時間軸，實現流暢編輯。
• 大量過場效果：讓您的故事持續推進。
• 在外接顯示器上顯示預覽：在大螢幕上查看。
• 加入標記、標籤和備註：計畫案保持井井有條。
• 加入旁白：在播放您的電影的同時錄製旁白。

【圖層效果、色彩校正】
• 綠幕、亮度與色度去背：運用創意來建立圖層合成。
• Lock and Load 穩定器：保持鏡頭穩定。
• 強大的色彩校正：打造您自己的風格。
• 視頻波形、向量和直方圖範圍。
• LUT 色彩檔：匯入並套用多個 .cube 或 .3dl LUT 色彩檔。
• 關鍵影格無限數量：精準製作動畫效果。
• 自訂文字和效果預設值：儲存並分享你喜歡的動畫效果和外觀。
• 網格和參考線：精確對齊元素與標題安全區域、動作安全區域和水平線。

【進階音訊控制】
• 使用圖示型等化器、參數型等化器、聲音隔離功能：完美調整音訊細節。
• 關鍵影格音訊電平、聲像、等化器：進行完美混音。
• 支援立體聲和雙單聲道音訊：適用於在單一片段中使用多個麥克風的訪談。
• 使用自動迴避：在話語期間迴避音樂，保持音訊平衡。
• 第三方音訊擴充程式：增強聲音效果。

【創意標題字幕、多層文字】
• 建立多層標題字幕：將圖形、圖像和文字加入您的圖形中。
• 自行調整字體、顏色、填充顏色、邊框和陰影：設計出引人注目的標題字幕。
• 匯入自訂字體：增強您的品牌。
• 儲存並分享標題字幕預設值：非常適合協作。

【計畫案彈性管理、媒體素材庫】
• 涵蓋所有不同需求的長寬比：包括寬銀幕電影、社群媒體影片或更多其他需求。
• 影格率範圍為 18fps-240fps：可靈活應用於任何工作流程。
• 直接編輯來自 USB-C 硬碟、「照片」App 和 Frame.io 的媒體項目：讓你隨時隨地存取媒體內容。
• 從雲端匯入媒體：自選儲存空間，沒有限制。

【分享剪輯成果】
• 控制解析度、畫質和格式：
• 將電影分享至社交媒體、本地儲存或雲端儲存。
• 跨裝置剪輯：輕鬆無縫傳輸計畫案。

增強功能（可單獨購買，或作為創作者通行證訂閱的一部分獲取所有功能 - 請參見下文）
• 速度調節與增強關鍵幀 - 使用這個獨一無二且易於使用的功能，創建速度調節、貝茲曲線和緩動效果。
• XML 匯出：將你的計畫案匯出到 Mac 上的 Final Cut Pro
• Multicam Studio「多機工作室」：同步 6 個攝影機或音訊，點一下即可切換角度

創作者通行證訂閱
• 享用 Storyblocks for LumaFusion：數百萬首高品質免版稅音樂、音效和視頻，還可獲得上述所有增強功能。

【免費優質支援服務】
• 線上教學：www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch
• 參考指南：luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide
• 支援：luma-touch.com/support

tw.description:
"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration."
-Nikola Tesla

KEY FEATURES:

- Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app
- Customizable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center
- Real-time aurora prediction with full map view
- Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro)
- Advanced burst analysis and notifications (EarthBeat Pro)
- Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro)
- Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro)
- Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages)

Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity.

EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) data. The GCP displays as a 3D colored indicator reflecting global consciousness patterns.

Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP Dot Widget displays consciousness patterns.

New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom.

EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, and 10-week archive for tracking patterns. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development.
Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields.

Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian.

If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch.
All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app.

Genius Scan 8.9 improves day-to-day reliability and polish, with a focus on stability throughout the app and the style of several visual elements so the app feels even more refined.

IMPROVED

- For OneDrive Export Shortcuts, Genius Scan now shows a warning banner when opening the destination picker to explain that some folders may not appear because of Microsoft changes.

FIXED

- Fixed an issue where the toolbar could be disabled after previewing a page in the Page selection screen.
- Fully restored QR code detection in the camera screen.
- Fixed a bug that could repeatedly show the Subscription sheet after renewal for some users with monthly subscriptions.

tw.description:
Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

==企業版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理組態： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中
 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） 
 - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務
 - 無廣告

==主要功能== 

智慧掃描： 

 - 檔案檢測和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理
 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） 
 - 批量掃描

 PDF建立和編輯： 

 - 文件合併和拆分
 - 多頁PDF創建
 - 照片和PDF匯入

安全和隱私： 

 - 裝置上文件處理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密碼加密

文件組織： 

 - 文件標記
 - 元數據和內容搜索
 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 

匯出：

 - 電子郵件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自動後台自動匯出

OCR（文本識別）：

 + 文字提取
 + 創建可搜尋的PDF
 + 掃描名片和建立連絡人

==關於我們== 

The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。

==定價和法律==

您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。

You have ventured this far, now there is no turning back. Uncover the island’s dark history by travelling through crumbling caverns and mysterious laboratories, but be warned, some may not be too welcoming of your presence…

The epic conclusion to the Meridian 157 series has arrived! Follow Dr. Zander into the heart of the facility to discover the sinister purpose behind the FLARE project, and to avert the impending disaster brought on by its conception.

With the most unique puzzles of the series, Meridian 157: Chapter 3 takes you to the source of the anomaly through a thrilling journey of mind-bending enigmas, perilous exploration and unsettling secrets of the island’s previous inhabitants. Follow Dr. Zander as he is pushed to his wits-end in this final adventure.

Features:
• The final and longest chapter in the Meridian 157 storyline!
• The most unique and challenging puzzles to date
• Immersive graphics
• Custom ambient soundtrack
• A logical two tier hint system
• Available in 9 different languages
• Color blind mode

tw.description:
法医气象学家David Zander（大卫·赞德）的故事即将完结。大卫被困在一个失落而被遗忘的岛屿的地下深处，他的首要任务是从他周围的神秘事物寻找答案，并且从他所处的危机中生存下来。现在由你来寻找逃离危机重重的157子午线背后的方法，但是要注意，因为逃离可不会那么容易。大卫会找到他想要的答案吗，他的努力是徒劳的吗？

《子午线157》是一个触控式冒险系列，一系列章节种包含各种互动谜题和有趣的故事情节。本游戏使用最先进的渲染技术构建，重点在于让玩家沉浸在独特又恐怖的环境中，同时让玩家享受新奇的解谜过程。现在来尝试完全免费的章节吧，来体验《子午线157》系列提供全新感受！

特征：
•定制音乐，以及高品质的视觉体验：
•全新的产品组合功能，支持多种不同的播放风格
•最新一集更新了一段惊险刺激的故事情节
•富有挑战性和趣味性的谜题
•非常困难的谜语解谜系统
•提供8种语言，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、中文（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！
•新的色盲模式适用于可能有色盲问题的人

在寻找神秘现象时，你发现自己被困在一个偏远寒冷，靠近北极岛屿上的一处设施中。这是什么地方？是谁建造了它？为什么遭到遗弃了？探索无人居住的复杂环境，你现在发现自己陷入困境，但要注意：可能并不只有你自己在这里…

灵感来源于经典的点击式解谜游戏，《子午线157:第一章》是这个的冒险系列的最新力作。你将扮演大卫·赞德（David Zander），作为一位气象学家，亲自去阿拉斯加海岸调查一个神秘的天气异常。在这里，你将搜索，调查并解开重重谜团，进一步深揭开第157条子午线背后的真相。

游戏特色：
• 代入式、令人印象深刻的定制配乐和音效
• 延续了惊险刺激情节
• 设计精巧的解谜内容
• 为困难谜题设计的逻辑提示系统
• 8种语言版本，包括英语、法语、俄语、德语、汉语（普通话）、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和意大利语！

透過此應用程序，您可以有效率且個人化地自動撥打您想要的號碼。您可以定義重複次數、通話間隔、新增分機號碼、撥號前啟動震動，甚至使用內建行事曆安排通話。 「自動重撥應用程式」還提供簡單直覺的介面、詳細的通話記錄和多種自訂選項，以滿足您的需求。

此應用程式非常適合需要自動重複撥打電話的任何人 - 例如預約電話、忙線重試或聯絡線路繁忙的服務。

主要特點：
- 自動重撥佔線或未接來電。
- 設定重試次數和時間間隔。
- 透過行事曆提前安排通話。
- 撥號後自動新增分機號碼。
- 每次重撥前啟用振動。
- 通話記錄和重試統計。

tw.description:
經典到不能再經典的紅白機坦克, 小時候發夢也在玩. 在2012年我們為了延續兒時回憶, 開發了超級坦克大戰, 很多人到現在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因為我們提供了500張地圖. 天天玩, 玩了多年也還未玩完.

由於遊戲引擎老化問題, 我們很難在超級坦克大戰的基礎上加入新功能. 所以我們決定開發新的坦克大戰, "無盡坦克大戰", 延續經典回憶. 

作為經典的延續無盡坦克大戰, 包含了所有經典元素, 改良了的新特點.
保證你可以玩到下一個十年.

遊戲重點:
- 防禦你的基地
- 摧毀所有敵方坦克
- 加入超級坦克大戰500張傳奇地圖

無盡坦克大戰, 是個跨平台遊戲, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的蹤影.
遊戲會不定期更新, 目標是1000張地圖.

tw.description:
變成日本的鐵路公司，挑戰世界上最繁忙的通勤高峰!

玩 "東京電車 "不需要任何鐵路知識。
這個遊戲是一個規則簡單的腦力遊戲，但需要大量的腦力。

顧客們在車站等待著火車的到來，把他們送到目的地。
啟動火車，運送你的顧客。

每一位登上火車的乘客，你都能賺到錢。
調整運行間隔和車廂數量，以達到最高收入。
發出列車要花錢。如果你發的火車太多，登車率下降，你將失去收入。

操作方法非常容易，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整火車車廂的數量，讓火車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，快遞票價也會出現。

完全不需要技術知識。
喜歡火車的人和喜歡游戲的人都能很快理解並享受遊戲。

沒有應用內購買。沒有廣告。
請專注於遊戲。
在社交媒體上分享你的操作結果。

在台湾和日本鐵路線上駕駛電車並載客。

・簡單的益智遊戲
“東京電車２”是一款規則簡單的益智遊戲。無需專業知識。
火車迷，遊戲迷，人人都能享受。

・致所有將成為行動調度員的人
在日本的早晨，顧客們正在等待火車的到來去上班。
讓我們啟動火車並運送客戶。

- 遊戲目標
日本鐵路公司是營利性組織。讓我們以高營業利潤為目標吧！

・如何產生利潤
票價收入-出發成本=營業利潤。

票價收入是在車站的顧客登上火車時產生的。
示例）如果兩名乘客在票價為 20 的車站上車，他們將獲得 40。

發車費按發車時的車廂數收取。
示例）2 節車廂的火車為 30，4 節車廂的火車為 40，10 節車廂的火車為 70。


一個人可以乘坐一輛車。
票價收入是在乘客登上火車時產生的。
調整行駛距離和車輛數量以獲得最大利潤。
離境費用。如果你開的火車太多，而佔用率下降，你就會損失收入。

·操作方法
控制非常簡單，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整列車的車廂數量，讓列車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，將會出現各種變化，例如特快列車和換乘站。

·體積
享受 50 多條路線。
請體驗日本鐵路公司的各種運輸策略。

- 沒有廣告，沒有計費
沒有應用內購買。無廣告。
請專心玩遊戲。孩子們可以安心地玩耍。
讓我們分享在 社交媒體 上駕駛的結果。

・鐵路玩
JR東日本、JR東海、JR西日本、JR九州、東武、東急、西武、京王、京急、京阪、阪急、阪神、近鐵、名鐵、小田急、南海、西鐵、相鐵、京成、東京地鐵、大阪地鐵、都營地鐵, 筑波快遞

・容量約130MB
存儲負擔也小。根本沒有繁重的處理。

Trapped deep underground on a lost and forgotten island, David’s priority shifts from finding answers about the mystery surrounding him, to surviving the crisis he now finds himself trapped in. It’s now up to you to find an escape from the madness of meridian 157, but be warned, as escape may not come so easily. Will David find the answers he searched so hard for, or will his efforts all be in vain?

Meridian 157 is a point and click adventure series involving interactive puzzles and an intriguing storyline taking place over a long series of chapters. Built using state of the art rendering technology, this installment focuses on immersing players in unique and frightening environments, while allowing them to enjoy notable puzzles and engaging interactions. us.description:
Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!
Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy.

How Deep will you Delve?
The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.
You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive!


Choose Your Path
You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory!
Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."


Many Ways to Play
Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

us.releaseNotes:
[New] Added a story arc for Berserkers, featuring three distinct story paths and all-new skill trees.
This story follows the Ursine tribe, whose future hangs by a thread after they are brutalized by a force even more savage than their own.
Strength defines the Ursine berserker. Will he continue down the same path, or seek an entirely different way?
[New] Added a brand-new in-party character interaction feature, giving heroes with different personalities and backgrounds completely new ways to converse.
Each character has their own story, and their relationships with one another are intricate. You can uncover these connections through their dialogues.
[New] Added over a hundred random backstories and dialogues for procedurally generated characters.
Previously, only the most renowned heroes had recorded stories. Now, many of the less important characters have their own backgrounds and personalities.
They too help bring life and color to the vast sands.
[New] Added attack speed and reworked hundreds of skill effects. The basic attacks of heroes and troops are now affected by attack speed.
Previously, attack speed only affected the interval between your character's attacks.
We improved attack speed in a previous version, enabling it to affect heroes' basic attacks.
This time, we've taken it further: attack speed now affects most skills' fore- and backswing times as well as channeling durations.
We previously made it compatible with heroes; now, troops benefit from it too!

[Optimization] Greatly improved map loading times for much faster map switching. (Performance tests show roughly a tenfold improvement.)
[Optimization] Reworked the top UI information display to improve readability when obtaining large amounts of items.
[Optimization] Improved world map unit behavior logic, improving smoothness in late-game saves.
[Optimization] Improved the world map unit loading algorithm, reducing lag when large numbers of units appear.
[Optimization] Reworked the character pop-up dialogue UI, improving clarity and readability.
[Optimization] Restructured pathfinding and collision algorithms. This should fix issues where troops got stuck in walls and resolve other pathfinding problems.
[Optimization] Improved aura trigger checks for the user, which should reduce lag.
[Optimization] You can now rename randomized characters in the Intel menu.
[Optimization] Added a toggle for combat damage numbers in the settings, with options to customize which units' damage numbers are displayed.
[Optimization] Added a Screen Shake toggle, available under Settings.
[Optimization] The Berserker's Outburst (++++) can now be cancelled manually.

[Fix] Fixed a bug where missing character attribute fields could prevent battles from starting, and then ultimately the game crashing.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing the Tavern Girl from triggering quest prompts, which affected the Spiritmancer and Bounty Hunter main quests, among others.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where character entries could appear blank when joining a faction.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where some character action sets (e.g., hammer, harp, dual blades) lacked transition animations.
[Fix] Fixed an issue causing skill tree lines to render incorrectly when node order was inconsistent.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing auto-equipment updates for characters able to wield all weapon types.
us.description:
This is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day...

Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

us.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

us.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

us.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device.

iPhone 6S and higher

A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

Moncage is a stunning vignette puzzle adventure developed by Optillusion. 

The game takes place inside a mysterious cube, with each side of the cube housing a unique world: be it an old factory, a light tower, an amusement park, or a church, etc. At first sight, they may seem random and unrelated, but upon closer look, you will become mesmerized by the subtle and intricate ways of how these worlds connect…  

【Solve Puzzles with Mind-Boggling Optical Illusions】
Use your imagination and spare no brain cells to find the connection and pinpoint every possible interaction between different sides of the cube, then watch as the magic unfold in front of you.

【Collect All Photos to Unveil the Story】
Behind the puzzles, there lies a story with a surprising twist for the player to uncover. Collect the photos from obscure corners and angles to reveal the underlying story, one photo at a time.

【Get Unstuck with Thoughtful Hints】
There is a multitude of guidance systems to help prevent players from getting stuck. Focus can be activated to highlight the key items to the solution, while hint texts are available to provide further clarity. And, if all else fails, video walkthroughs can be unlocked as the ultimate safety plan. 

【Prove Your Puzzle-Solving Skills with Medals】
There are a total of 15 achievements in the game, each corresponding with a Medal that has been crafted with a uniquely stunning design. A complete collection of the 15 Medals could be the perfect evidence to attest to your master puzzle-solving skills~

[New] Added a brand-new in-party character interaction feature, giving heroes with different personalities and backgrounds completely new ways to converse.
Each character has their own story, and their relationships with one another are intricate. You can uncover these connections through their dialogues.
[New] Added over a hundred random backstories and dialogues for procedurally generated characters.
Previously, only the most renowned heroes had recorded stories. Now, many of the less important characters have their own backgrounds and personalities.
They too help bring life and color to the vast sands.
[New] Added attack speed and reworked hundreds of skill effects. The basic attacks of heroes and troops are now affected by attack speed.
Previously, attack speed only affected the interval between your character's attacks.
We improved attack speed in a previous version, enabling it to affect heroes' basic attacks.
This time, we've taken it further: attack speed now affects most skills' fore- and backswing times as well as channeling durations.
We previously made it compatible with heroes; now, troops benefit from it too!

[Optimization] Greatly improved map loading times for much faster map switching. (Performance tests show roughly a tenfold improvement.)
[Optimization] Reworked the top UI information display to improve readability when obtaining large amounts of items.
[Optimization] Improved world map unit behavior logic, improving smoothness in late-game saves.
[Optimization] Improved the world map unit loading algorithm, reducing lag when large numbers of units appear.
[Optimization] Reworked the character pop-up dialogue UI, improving clarity and readability.
[Optimization] Restructured pathfinding and collision algorithms. This should fix issues where troops got stuck in walls and resolve other pathfinding problems.
[Optimization] Improved aura trigger checks for the user, which should reduce lag.
[Optimization] You can now rename randomized characters in the Intel menu.
[Optimization] Added a toggle for combat damage numbers in the settings, with options to customize which units' damage numbers are displayed.
[Optimization] Added a Screen Shake toggle, available under Settings.
[Optimization] The Berserker's Outburst (++++) can now be cancelled manually.

[Fix] Fixed a bug where missing character attribute fields could prevent battles from starting, and then ultimately the game crashing.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing the Tavern Girl from triggering quest prompts, which affected the Spiritmancer and Bounty Hunter main quests, among others.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where character entries could appear blank when joining a faction.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where some character action sets (e.g., hammer, harp, dual blades) lacked transition animations.
[Fix] Fixed an issue causing skill tree lines to render incorrectly when node order was inconsistent.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing auto-equipment updates for characters able to wield all weapon types.

How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

tr.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

tr.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy.

- Set number of retries and time intervals.
- Schedule calls in advance via calendar.
- Add extensions automatically after dialing.

Perfect for:

- Customer service or tech support

Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

tr.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Craft your perfect defense from a combination of powerful Monkey Towers and awesome Heroes, then pop every last invading Bloon!

Over a decade of tower defense pedigree and regular massive updates makes Bloons TD 6 a favorite game for millions of players. Enjoy endless hours of strategy gaming with Bloons TD 6!

* Odysseys! Battle through a series of maps connected by their theme, rules, and rewards.

Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

tr.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Twitter: /@JuicyRealm

[Minimum Requirements]

Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device.

iPhone 6S and higher
iPad Air 2 and higher
iPad Mini 4 and higher

A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

Moncage is a stunning vignette puzzle adventure developed by Optillusion. 

The game takes place inside a mysterious cube, with each side of the cube housing a unique world: be it an old factory, a light tower, an amusement park, or a church, etc. At first sight, they may seem random and unrelated, but upon closer look, you will become mesmerized by the subtle and intricate ways of how these worlds connect…  

【Solve Puzzles with Mind-Boggling Optical Illusions】
Use your imagination and spare no brain cells to find the connection and pinpoint every possible interaction between different sides of the cube, then watch as the magic unfold in front of you.

【Collect All Photos to Unveil the Story】
Behind the puzzles, there lies a story with a surprising twist for the player to uncover. Collect the photos from obscure corners and angles to reveal the underlying story, one photo at a time.

【Get Unstuck with Thoughtful Hints】
There is a multitude of guidance systems to help prevent players from getting stuck. Focus can be activated to highlight the key items to the solution, while hint texts are available to provide further clarity. And, if all else fails, video walkthroughs can be unlocked as the ultimate safety plan.

There are a total of 15 achievements in the game, each corresponding with a Medal that has been crafted with a uniquely stunning design. A complete collection of the 15 Medals could be the perfect evidence to attest to your master puzzle-solving skills~

O meteorologista forense David Zander está no fim do poço. Preso no subsolo de uma ilha perdida e esquecida, a prioridade de David passa de encontrar respostas sobre o mistério que o envolve para sobreviver à crise em que ele agora se vê preso. Cabe a você encontrar uma saída da loucura de Meridian 157, mas fique o aviso que a fuga não será tão fácil. Será que David encontrará as respostas que tanto procurou, ou todos os seus esforços serão em vão? 

O Meridian 157 é uma série de aventura point-and-click envolvendo quebra-cabeças interativos e um enredo intrigante que ocorre ao longo de uma longa série de capítulos. Construído usando a tecnologia de renderização do estado de arte, esta instalação foca na imersão dos jogadores em ambientes únicos e assustadores, permitindo-lhes desfrutar de quebra-cabeças complexos e interações envolventes. • Todos os novos itens combinam características, suportando muitos estilos diferentes de jogo
• Último episódio continuando um enredo assustador e emocionante

pt.description:
Aventure-se roubando no premiado jogo de tabuleiro!
Uma nova aventura começa!
"Clank!, o icônico jogo de aventura de tabuleiro de construção de baralho desafia os ladrões ousados a se infiltrarem no covil do dragão, roubar um de seus preciosos artefatos e escapar antes de virar churrasco!

Juntando mais fãs e prêmios ao redor do mundo, Clank! é um dos mais amados jogos de tabuleiro moderno com muitas expansões e adaptações para a diversão dos jogadores."
O quão fundo você irá se aventurar?
"Quanto mais fundo for, mais valiosos serão os tesouros que encontrar... mas será mais difícil ainda escapar! Então seja breve e não faça barulho: Um passo em falso e CLANK! Cada barulho pode chamar a atenção do dragão.

Você está competindo contra seus amigos ladrões para reivindicar o prêmio mais valioso... mas você só terá o saque se conseguir escapar das profundezas com vida!"

Misturando construção de baralho e exploração, Clank! oferece uma aventura de exploração de masmorra única a cada vez que jogar."
Diversas formas de jogar
"Aprenda a usar as cordas no tutorial guia e aprimore suas habilidades ao coletar conquistas e concluir desafios. Jogue em multiplataforma com os amigos ou compita em novos e empolgantes Assaltos que colocam você contra jogadores de todo o mundo!

Seja como for que você entrar na masmorra: boa sorte... você vai precisar!"

pt.releaseNotes:
[New] Added a story arc for Berserkers, featuring three distinct story paths and all-new skill trees.
This story follows the Ursine tribe, whose future hangs by a thread after they are brutalized by a force even more savage than their own.
Strength defines the Ursine berserker. Will he continue down the same path, or seek an entirely different way?
[New] Added a brand-new in-party character interaction feature, giving heroes with different personalities and backgrounds completely new ways to converse.
Each character has their own story, and their relationships with one another are intricate. You can uncover these connections through their dialogues.
[New] Added over a hundred random backstories and dialogues for procedurally generated characters.
Previously, only the most renowned heroes had recorded stories. Now, many of the less important characters have their own backgrounds and personalities.
They too help bring life and color to the vast sands.
[New] Added attack speed and reworked hundreds of skill effects. The basic attacks of heroes and troops are now affected by attack speed.
Previously, attack speed only affected the interval between your character's attacks.
We improved attack speed in a previous version, enabling it to affect heroes' basic attacks.
This time, we've taken it further: attack speed now affects most skills' fore- and backswing times as well as channeling durations.
We previously made it compatible with heroes; now, troops benefit from it too!

[Optimization] Greatly improved map loading times for much faster map switching. (Performance tests show roughly a tenfold improvement.)
[Optimization] Reworked the top UI information display to improve readability when obtaining large amounts of items.
[Optimization] Improved world map unit behavior logic, improving smoothness in late-game saves.
[Optimization] Improved the world map unit loading algorithm, reducing lag when large numbers of units appear.
[Optimization] Reworked the character pop-up dialogue UI, improving clarity and readability.
[Optimization] Restructured pathfinding and collision algorithms. This should fix issues where troops got stuck in walls and resolve other pathfinding problems.
[Optimization] Improved aura trigger checks for the user, which should reduce lag.
[Optimization] You can now rename randomized characters in the Intel menu.
[Optimization] Added a toggle for combat damage numbers in the settings, with options to customize which units' damage numbers are displayed.
[Optimization] Added a Screen Shake toggle, available under Settings.
[Optimization] The Berserker's Outburst (++++) can now be cancelled manually.

[Fix] Fixed a bug where missing character attribute fields could prevent battles from starting, and then ultimately the game crashing.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing the Tavern Girl from triggering quest prompts, which affected the Spiritmancer and Bounty Hunter main quests, among others.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where character entries could appear blank when joining a faction.
[Fix] Fixed a bug where some character action sets (e.g., hammer, harp, dual blades) lacked transition animations.
[Fix] Fixed an issue causing skill tree lines to render incorrectly when node order was inconsistent.
[Fix] Fixed an issue preventing auto-equipment updates for characters able to wield all weapon types.

Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

pt.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

pt.description:
LumaFusion: a melhor experiência narrativa para edição de vídeos

Welcome to the App Store’s “App of the Year” for 2021 and the recipient of the Editors’ Choice Award! The gold standard for storytellers worldwide. Offering a fluid, intuitive, touch-screen editing experience.

EDIÇÃO PROFISSIONAL FACILITADA
• Seis faixas de vídeo/áudio ou gráficos: crie edições de múltiplas camadas com manuseio fácil de mídia 4K ProRes e HDR.
• Seis faixas de áudio adicionais: construa seu ambiente sonoro.
• A linha do tempo ideal: edição fluente usando a linha do tempo magnética e guiada mais flexível do mundo.
• Muitas transições: mantenha sua história em movimento.
• Prévia no monitor externo: veja em uma tela grande.
• Marcadores, tags e notas: mantenha-se organizado.
• Locução: grave VO enquanto reproduz seu filme.

EFEITOS EM CAMADAS E CORREÇÃO DE COR
• Tela verde, luma e chroma key: para a composição criativa.
• Prepare o estabilizador de vídeo: mantenha sua filmagem estável.
• Correção de cores poderosa: crie o seu próprio visual.
• Formas de onda de vídeo, escopo vetorial e histograma.
• LUTs: Importe e aplique múltiplas LUTs .cube ou .3dl.
• Quadros-chave ilimitados: anime efeitos com precisão.
• Presets de textos e efeitos personalizáveis: salve e compartilhe suas animações e visuais favoritos.
• Grades e guias: alinhe elementos com título seguro, ação segura e linha de horizonte.

CONTROLE DE ÁUDIO AVANÇADO
• Equalizador gráfico, equalizador paramétrico e isolamento de voz: sintonize o áudio.
• Níveis de áudio de quadro-chave, panorâmica e equalizador: crie mixagens perfeitas.
• Suporte para áudio estéreo e mono duplo: para entrevistas com vários microfones em um clipe.
Redução de áudio: equilibre sua música e diálogo.
• Plug-ins de áudio externos: aprimore seu som.

TÍTULOS CRIATIVOS E TEXTO MULTICAMADAS
• Títulos multicamadas: combine formas, imagens e textos em seu gráfico.
• Fontes, cores, bordas e sombras personalizáveis: crie títulos atrativos.
• Importe fontes personalizadas: fortaleça sua marca.
• Salve e compartilhe presets de títulos: perfeito para colaboração.

FLEXIBILIDADE DE PROJETOS E BIBLIOTECA DE MÍDIA
• Proporções para todos os usos: do cinema panorâmico às redes sociais.
• Taxas de quadros de 18 fps a 240 fps: flexibilidade para qualquer cenário.
• Edite a partir das Fotos, Frame.io e diretamente de unidades USB-C: acesse seu conteúdo em qualquer lugar.
• Importe mídias do armazenamento na nuvem: onde quer que você as armazene.

COMPARTILHE SUAS OBRAS-PRIMAS
• Controle resolução, qualidade e formato:
• Compartilhar filmes em redes sociais, armazenamento local ou armazenamento em nuvem.
• Edite em vários dispositivos: transfira projetos com facilidade.

RECURSOS AVANÇADOS (compre individualmente ou obtenha TODOS como parte da assinatura do Creator Pass - veja abaixo)
• Aceleração de Velocidade e Keyframing Aprimorado - Crie rampas de velocidade, curvas de Bézier e easing com este recurso único e fácil de usar.
• Exportação XML: Exporte seu projeto para o Final Cut Pro para Mac
• Multicam Studio: sincronize 6 câmeras ou áudio e toque para alternar ângulos

ASSINATURA CREATOR PASS
• Obtenha acesso total ao Storyblocks para LumaFusion: milhões de músicas, efeitos sonoros e vídeos isentos de direitos autorais de alta qualidade, além de obter todos os recursos aprimorados acima.

SUPORTE GRATUITO EXTRAORDINÁRIO
• Tutoriais on-line: www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch
• Guia de referência: luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide
• Suporte: luma-touch.com/support

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

《手机帝国》是一款以“造手机”为题材的高自由度单机模拟经营游戏。你扮演一名回到2001年的创业者，因为独到的眼光拿到了神秘投资人的启动资金，进而创立了一家可能改变世界的科技企业。游戏从2001年开始到2035年结束，你将从研发最早期的九宫格智能手机开始，一直到研发可完全独立使用的AR智能眼镜结束。在这35年时间里，你将亲历、见证、推动智能手机波澜壮阔的发展历程，并有机会把你的公司发展成为世界第一的科技企业。

•有深度的玩法
《手机帝国》的核心玩法是研发更好的图纸、升级更牛的科技、打造更强的团队、研发更好的手机、赚取更多的利润，如此循环。而“如何用人”是整个游戏的精髓所在，根据员工的能力、天赋和技能，把合适的员工放到合适的岗位才会发挥出其最大潜能。员工的配合还会触发团队突破效果，这是一个可以让你突破科技限制从而创造奇迹的新机制。

•海量的内容
你在游戏中可研发经典的九宫格手机、全键盘手机、早期触控手机、全面屏手机、折叠屏手机，甚至未来的AR智能眼镜，总共有超过100种手机外观供你研究。

•不断进阶的科技
游戏中的电池、屏幕、材质、相机等均可不断升级，在你资金充裕时甚至可以启动CPU和操作系统的自研项目，你将有可能研发出性能逆天的芯片来大幅提升自己的手机品质。

•新颖的竞争体验
你作为科技公司的CEO将与各个时期的科技巨头们展开竞争，你可以选择和他们搞好关系共谋发展，也可以为争夺优秀人才展开挖人大战。

•大量的随机事件
为了增加游戏的世界感，我们在游戏中融入了大量的随机事件，包括：世界事件、行业新闻、危机事件、幸运事件、员工事件、记者采访等等，甚至还包括比如太空电梯、火星登陆、AI大爆发等未来事件。

•独创的说服系统
为了更好的模拟现实生活中的人才招揽过程，我们在游戏中内置了一款小游戏，该游戏以古老的“九型人格”为原型，玩家需要根据招募对象的不同人格类型，采用不同的沟通技巧和策略来说服对方。越是顶级的人才，说服的难度越高。

•更多等待你探索的内容
游戏中还包括信用评级、企业并购、情报系统、员工培养、公司战略等其他好玩的元素等待你来探索。

pt.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Uma história sobre a viagem de dois doutores através das memórias de um homem moribundo, de modo a realizar artificialmente o seu último desejo.

Mais detalhes
A história de "To the Moon" revela-se diante dos jogadores, assim como um filme. Enquanto o jogo completo não tem sistema de batalha e pode ser finalizado em algumas horas, a atraente história e a trilha sonora original tocante ressoa com os jogadores em todo o mundo. Além de receber grandes classificações positivas, "To the Moon" ganhou muitos prêmios da Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, e muito mais, e foi nomeado para "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" nos Prêmios Steam de 2016.
"To the Moon", um RPG baseado em história com gráficos em pixels, foi originalmente desenvolvido há seis anos para PC pelo produtor canadense Kan Gao e pela Freebird Games, seu estúdio de jogos indie. Os direitos de desenvolver e publicar a versão móvel remasterizada de "To the Moon" foram adquiridos pela X.D. Network Inc.

Sobre este jogo
Os doutores Rosalene e Watts têm trabalhos peculiares, eles oferecem a chance de viver outra vez, tudo dentro da mente dos seus pacientes.

Devido a seriedade da operação, a nova vida torna-se na última coisa de que os pacientes se lembram antes de respirarem uma última vez. Assim, a operação só é aplicada a pessoas em estado terminal, pare que possam experienciar o que sempre quiseram, mas não conseguiram.

Esta história particular segue a tentativa de completar o sonho de Johnny, um homem idoso. Ao recuarem na sua memória, novos fragmentos do seu passado se vão relevados. Ao unir os acontecimentos da sua vida, os dois doutores procuram descobrir a razão por detrás do seu último pedido.

E o último desejo de Johnny é, claro… ir para a lua.

CARACTERÍSTICAS CHAVE

•Nova função de música. Suporta música de fundo. Baixar músicas para o jogo (abre automaticamente após finalizado)
•Novo DIY
Função de Compartilhamento de Código. Clique e compartilhe com amigos em qualquer lugar."
•Uma experiência única que não se baseia no combate, revolvendo à volta da história.
•Uma mistura inovativa de elementos de jogos de aventura com o estilo estético de RPGs clássicos.
•Uma soundtrack original reconhecida criticamente que se liga intimamente à historia. 
•Uma execução rápida sem perdas de tempo ou esperas inúteis.

pt.description:
ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game. As you follow the narrator's omnipresent voice, you will see through ICEY's eyes and learn the truth about her world. 

“Alright, you caught me! This ISN'T really just a simple 2D action game, and you WON'T be seeing through ICEY's eyes... NOR will you learn the truth about her world." says the narrator. 

“ICEY is a Meta game in disguise. The narrator will constantly urge you in one direction, but you must ask, "Why? Why am I following his directions? Why can't I learn the truth about this world and ICEY's purpose here?" Fight against his tyranny, and uncover what's really going on for yourself!

In fact, you can become ICEY, and let loose the shackles of your own identity. You are ICEY, and ICEY is you... if you want it that way. Feel free to keep hold of your own self, if you wish. 

Now Is the Time For You to Discover the Truth.

[FEATURES]

Fast-paced Combat: 
Crush enemies in the palm of your hand. 
Attack! Dodge! Counterattack! Do not hesitate. 
This is the only way to survive! 

Incredible Combos: 
With simple controls, amazing combos are easy to unleash, even for beginners. 
Every skill is special in its own way. Master your favorites and create your own fighting style!

Massive Cyborg Bosses: 
Can you withstand the onslaught of attacks from terrifying cyborg bosses? 
Every boss unleashes flurries of different attacks. It's up to you to find their weak spots and tear them apart!

[Awards]
-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 DENGEKI PlayStation Best Indie Game
-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth 
-Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016 
-Official Selection, Casual Connect Asia 2016 
-Official Selection, IGF China 2015 
-Best Technology Award, Indieplay 2015

Moncage is a stunning vignette puzzle adventure developed by Optillusion. 

The game takes place inside a mysterious cube, with each side of the cube housing a unique world: be it an old factory, a light tower, an amusement park, or a church, etc. At first sight, they may seem random and unrelated, but upon closer look, you will become mesmerized by the subtle and intricate ways of how these worlds connect…  

【Solve Puzzles with Mind-Boggling Optical Illusions】
Use your imagination and spare no brain cells to find the connection and pinpoint every possible interaction between different sides of the cube, then watch as the magic unfold in front of you.

【Collect All Photos to Unveil the Story】
Behind the puzzles, there lies a story with a surprising twist for the player to uncover. Collect the photos from obscure corners and angles to reveal the underlying story, one photo at a time.

【Get Unstuck with Thoughtful Hints】
There is a multitude of guidance systems to help prevent players from getting stuck. Focus can be activated to highlight the key items to the solution, while hint texts are available to provide further clarity. And, if all else fails, video walkthroughs can be unlocked as the ultimate safety plan. 

【Prove Your Puzzle-Solving Skills with Medals】
There are a total of 15 achievements in the game, each corresponding with a Medal that has been crafted with a uniquely stunning design. A complete collection of the 15 Medals could be the perfect evidence to attest to your master puzzle-solving skills~
